metadata.description: English UI messages, validation messages, error messages, and notification messages

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalid_date: Please enter a valid date in the format {format}
validation.text_too_short: Text must be at least {min} characters
validation.duplicate_entry: A duplicate entry already exists for '{identifier}'
validation.scope_mismatch: Scope 1 ({scope1}) + Scope 2 ({scope2}) + Scope 3 ({scope3}) does not equal Total ({total})
validation.negative_emissions: Emissions value cannot be negative for data point '{data_point}'
validation.future_date: Date cannot be in the future
validation.past_reporting_period: Reporting period end date must be after start date
validation.unit_mismatch: Unit '{provided}' does not match expected unit '{expected}' for data point '{data_point}'
validation.missing_baseline: Baseline value is required for target '{target}'
validation.target_exceeds_baseline: Target value exceeds baseline value for '{metric}'
validation.missing_methodology: Methodology description is required for estimated values
validation.data_quality_required: Data quality assessment is required for all quantitative data points
validation.boundary_mismatch: Reporting boundary is inconsistent between financial and sustainability statements
validation.materiality_required: Materiality assessment is required before generating the report
validation.incomplete_scope3: Not all material Scope 3 categories have been reported. Missing: {categories}
validation.verification_required: Verification is required for data point '{data_point}'
validation.temporal_gap: Data gap detected between {start} and {end} for metric '{metric}'
validation.cross_reference_broken: Cross-reference to '{reference}' could not be resolved

errors.generic_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again or contact support.
errors.data_load_failed: Failed to load data from source '{source}': {reason}
errors.authentication_failed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials.
errors.authorization_failed: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.connection_timeout: Connection to {service} timed out. Please try again.
errors.service_unavailable: Service '{service}' is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.rate_limit_exceeded: Rate limit exceeded. Please wait {seconds} seconds before retrying.
errors.file_too_large: File size ({size}) exceeds the maximum allowed size of {max_size}.
errors.unsupported_file_type: File type '{type}' is not supported. Supported types: {supported}
errors.invalid_template: Report template '{template}' is invalid or corrupted.
errors.emission_factor_not_found: Emission factor not found for '{source}' in region '{region}'
errors.locale_not_supported: Locale '{locale}' is not supported. Supported locales: {supported}
errors.concurrent_edit: This report is currently being edited by another user. Please try again later.
errors.version_conflict: Version conflict detected. The report has been modified since your last save.
errors.provenance_mismatch: Data provenance hash mismatch detected. Data may have been tampered with.

warnings.data_estimated: Some values have been estimated. Review estimated data points before submission.
warnings.incomplete_data: Data collection is incomplete for {count} data point(s)
warnings.low_data_quality: Data quality is below threshold for {count} metric(s)
warnings.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Save before leaving?
warnings.large_variance: Significant variance ({variance}%) detected in '{metric}' compared to prior period
warnings.missing_assurance: Third-party assurance has not been obtained for this report
warnings.scope3_estimated: Scope 3 emissions are based on estimations for {count} categor(ies)
warnings.baseline_change: Baseline year data has been recalculated. Please review targets.
warnings.phase_in_applicable: This disclosure requirement is subject to phase-in provisions
warnings.voluntary_only: This disclosure is voluntary for the current reporting period
warnings.data_freshness: Data for '{source}' is more than {days} days old

info.no_data: No data available for this period
info.draft_status: This report is in draft status

confirmations.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete '{item}'? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.submit_confirm: Are you sure you want to submit this report for review? You will not be able to edit it until the review is complete.
confirmations.publish_confirm: Are you sure you want to publish this report? Published reports are final and visible to all authorized stakeholders.
confirmations.discard_changes: Are you sure you want to discard unsaved changes?
confirmations.regenerate_confirm: Regenerating the report will overwrite any manual adjustments. Continue?
confirmations.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset all values to their defaults?

tooltips.data_quality: Data quality rating based on the PCAF scoring methodology (1 = highest, 5 = lowest)
tooltips.scope_1: Direct GHG emissions from sources owned or controlled by the company
tooltips.scope_2_location: Indirect GHG emissions from purchased energy using grid-average emission factors
tooltips.scope_2_market: Indirect GHG emissions from purchased energy using contractual emission factors
tooltips.scope_3: All other indirect GHG emissions in the company's value chain
tooltips.double_materiality: Assessment considering both the company's impact on sustainability matters (impact materiality) and the financial effects of sustainability matters on the company (financial materiality)
tooltips.esrs_phase_in: Some ESRS disclosure requirements have phase-in provisions allowing delayed adoption
tooltips.taxonomy_alignment: Percentage of economic activities aligned with the EU Taxonomy environmental objectives

email.report_ready_body: The CSRD sustainability report for {company_name} covering the period {period} is now ready for your review. Please log in to the platform to review and approve the report.
email.deadline_reminder_body: This is a reminder that the CSRD reporting deadline for {period} is in {days} day(s). Please ensure all data points are complete and validated.
email.approval_notification_body: The sustainability report for {company_name} ({period}) has been approved by {approver} on {date}.
